objective: Move the completed workforce program from development into staging and then main, then execute a bounded follow-on program that turns selected contract-only personas into registry-backed, action-backed, commercially claimable digital employees.
decision_rule: PromotionReady = DevelopmentMerged AND StagingAligned AND StagingValidated AND MainAligned. PersonaActivated = RegistryBacked AND ActionSurfaceImplemented AND AllowedDomainsBound AND ApprovalPolicyBound AND NotebookEvidenceGreen AND ScorecardGreen AND RuntimeRoutingGreen. CommercialActivationReady = PromotionReady AND Wave1ActivationGreen.
prompt_discipline: Maintain a formal prompt pair for the branch-promotion track and the persona-activation follow-on track under docs/prompts/, following the repo two-file prompt rule and the MATHS prompt template where execution details are delegated to Codex or Claude.

activation_meaning: Move personas from persona-contract-only to registry-backed with real allowed actions.
Bind each activated persona to bounded executor domains, auth rules, approvals, and audit semantics.
Produce notebook-backed evidence, tests, and scorecards so delegation claims remain honest.
Make the persona truly reachable through Claude -> UCP -> M365, not just present in the registry.

activate_first.why: Unlocks service architecture, API, and governance-aware backend planning for later waves.
Unlocks safer release, environment, and CI/CD execution for the rest of the workforce.
Unlocks fast certification loops and regression proof for every new persona action surface.
Unlocks reporting, ROI evidence, and customer-facing proof of value.
Unlocks release coordination, launch control, and delivery discipline.
Unlocks live customer support handling and post-launch operational credibility.

order.description: Promote development to staging, validate staging, then promote staging to main.
Activate the commercial growth and experience personas second.
Activate the remaining M365-backed specialist and regulated personas.
Certify the activated waves and update commercial packaging.
Prepare external-platform personas without active credentials, then activate them later with bounded runtime surfaces.

commercial_unlocks: P1 unlocks governed release promotion out of development.
P2B unlocks a credible build, ship, validate, report, and support workforce core.
P2C unlocks stronger product, design, and growth packages customers can buy.
P2D unlocks the higher-value specialist M365 workforce story only after safer layers are live.
P2E unlocks honest commercial claims that persona activation has materially advanced across the current M365-backed surface.
P3 unlocks future external-platform persona expansion only after adapter contracts, credentials, and runtime proof exist.

completed.summary: Created and pushed staging directly from the approved development tip so the release-candidate branch carries the exact post-expansion promotion and persona-activation plan state.

Validated staging branch parity and deterministic replay by confirming development, staging, origin/development, and origin/staging all resolve to the same commit with clean branch state and git diff --check green.
Created and pushed main directly from the validated staging tip, closing the branch-promotion track without divergence. Branches subsequently advanced to f967ef6 after P1 closeout commit.

Activation definition locked (6-point runtime state change), first-wave roster locked (backend-architect, devops-automator, api-tester, analytics-reporter, project-shipper, support-responder), wave order locked and later refined into the current fail-closed sequence (P2B foundation, P2C growth/experience, P2D M365-backed specialist/regulated, P2E certification closeout, then P3 external-platform preparation/activation), commercial unlock mapping locked per wave. All 11 MATHS checks passed (C0-C10). Gate GO.

Foundation operators activated: backend-architect (13 actions), devops-automator (10), api-tester (8), analytics-reporter (9), project-shipper (9), support-responder (8). Total 57 new actions across 4 departments. All pass 6-point activation test. L73 lemma, scorecard green, 25 tests passed, 4 CI verifiers passed. Registry-backed personas: 10/39.

Commercial growth and experience personas activated: content-creator (8 actions), growth-hacker (10), ui-designer (7), brand-guardian (8), feedback-synthesizer (7), sprint-prioritizer (8), ux-researcher (7), studio-producer (9). Total 64 new actions across 4 departments. All pass 6-point activation test. L74 lemma, scorecard green, 7 tests passed, CI verifier passed. Registry-backed personas: 18/39.

M365-backed specialist and regulated personas: 16 activated (ai-engineer 10, frontend-developer 7, mobile-app-builder 7, rapid-prototyper 8, test-writer-fixer 7, performance-benchmarker 8, test-results-analyzer 7, tool-evaluator 7, workflow-optimizer 8, finance-tracker 8, infrastructure-maintainer 8, legal-compliance-checker 8, visual-storyteller 7, whimsy-injector 7, experiment-tracker 8, trend-researcher 7). The 5 external-platform personas were formally moved into later P3 preparation/activation because they require unsupported non-M365 APIs. Total 122 new actions. L75 lemma, scorecard green, 8 tests passed, CI verifier passed. Registry-backed personas: 34/39.

in: Define the governed branch-promotion path from development to staging to main.
Define the plain-language persona-activation follow-on program.
Lock the first activation wave and its commercial rationale.
Create prompt pairs for promotion and activation.
Define the later external-platform preparation and activation track for personas that do not fit the current M365-backed surface.
out: Directly activating personas in this planning step.
Claiming all 39 personas are already live.
Claiming unsupported external-platform personas are active before credential-gated runtime surfaces exist.
Executing branch promotions during plan creation.

requirements.title: Prompt-pair coverage for promotion and activation
Re-scope P2D to the M365-backed specialist surface
Create the later external-platform preparation and activation track
Advance P2E without over-claiming blocked external-platform personas
Create formal prompt pairs for P2E and P3

phase_stack.title: Branch Promotion
phase_stack.goal: Promote the completed workforce program from development into staging and then main through a deterministic, governed branch path.
outputs: explicit development to staging to main sequence

children.title: Promote development to staging
children.goal: Create or align staging from the merged development tip and push it as the release-candidate branch.

children.title: Validate staging candidate
children.goal: Confirm staging is aligned, replay-safe, and ready for production promotion.

children.title: Promote staging to main
children.goal: Advance the validated release candidate from staging into main and close the promotion track.

phase_stack.title: Persona Activation Follow-On
phase_stack.goal: Turn selected contract-only personas into action-backed, commercially claimable digital employees in bounded waves.

children.title: Activation contract and first-wave lock
children.goal: Define activation entry criteria and lock the first-wave roster against the current authoritative persona registry.

children.title: Foundation operators activation
children.goal: Activate the build, release, QA, reporting, and support personas that make the rest of the workforce operable.

children.title: Commercial growth and experience activation
children.goal: Activate the next wave of product, design, and growth personas that strengthen the external commercial story.

children.title: Specialist and regulated persona activation
children.goal: Activate the higher-risk, long-tail, and specialist personas that fit inside the current M365-backed runtime after the first two waves are proven.

children.title: Activation certification and commercial closeout
children.goal: Certify the activated M365-backed persona waves and update the product packaging to match the new live surface.

phase_stack.title: External Platform Persona Preparation and Later Activation
phase_stack.goal: Prepare and later activate the external-platform personas without violating the current M365-only runtime and commercial claim boundaries.
outputs: later activation certification and packaging path

children.title: External platform contract and credentialless preparation
children.goal: Define env-var credential boundaries, adapter surfaces, and fail-closed not-configured behavior without claiming any persona is active.

children.title: Credential-gated runtime surface implementation
children.goal: Implement external-platform runtime surfaces only after bounded credentials, adapters, approvals, and routing exist.

children.title: External platform activation certification and packaging
children.goal: Certify and package the external-platform personas only after their runtime surfaces are live, validated, and commercially truthful.
